name: Damp Battlegrounds
description: A flooded industrial zone that smells of rust, regret, and someone else's energy drink. Ankle-deep water everywhere. Optimal for ambushes, sub-optimal for dry socks.

name: Buried City (Now 30% more buried)
description: An ancient city partially submerged in sand and rubble. The remnants of buildings poke out like tombstones, and the air is thick with the scent of history and decay.

name: Stella Camping Festival
description: You'll get camped. You get eighth-partied. Felicia will crash out. It's just Stella.

name: The Sprawl
description: A massive suburban wasteland where every house looks the same and every mailbox contains disappointment. Perfect for losing enemies and your sense of direction.

name: Old Growth Forest
description: Towering trees, thick fog, and the constant feeling that something is watching you. It is. Probably a robot. Possibly a raccoon.

name: The Crater
description: A massive impact site filled with twisted metal, scorched earth, and the faint smell of cosmic disappointment.

name: Sunken Outskirts
description: Half-drowned suburbs where rooftops poke out like desperate hands. Great loot, terrible footing.

name: The Ridge
description: A rocky highland with excellent sightlines and terrible cover. Bring a scope. And a will.

name: Forgotten Fields
description: Wide-open farmland reclaimed by nature and robots. Wheat, weeds, and wandering death machines.

name: The Hollows
description: A network of caves and collapsed tunnels. Echoes carry far. So do screams.

name: ARC Ruins
description: Crumbling ARC facilities filled with malfunctioning tech, broken dreams, and questionable safety protocols.

name: Shattered Bridge
description: A once-grand overpass now split in half. Great vantage point, terrible life choices.

name: Sunken Freeway
description: A highway swallowed by mud and water. Cars frozen in time. Some still have snacks.

name: The Breach
description: A massive tear in the landscape caused by something ARC refuses to comment on. The silence is louder than the robots.

name: The Overlook
description: A scenic cliffside view of the apocalypse. Great for snipers and existential crises.

name: The Sinkhole
description: A deep, ominous pit that swallows everything—including your hopes of an easy extraction.

name: Derelict Docks
description: Rotting piers, abandoned cargo, and water that definitely violates health codes.

name: Ashen Quarry
description: A grey, dusty excavation site where visibility is low and robot aggression is high.
